releaseNotes:
• Settings: collapsible groups (Playback, Buffering, Multi-view, Content, EPG) reduce scrolling — all sections start collapsed and expand on tap.
• Settings: refreshing an Xtream source now shows a live progress dialog instead of a plain spinner.
• Fix: backup export now includes matched EPG channel IDs, so a restore-from-backup followed by a source refresh preserves all EPG assignments without a full re-match.
• Diagnostics: improved logging for backup import/restore and M3U processing to make post-restore EPG flow traceable in the log.
